goal: Set the correct site URL and redirect URLs in the Supabase config / client setup so confirmation emails point to the app
summary: Configured Supabase redirect URLs. Step 1 added emailRedirectTo to signUp in src/lib/auth.ts pointing to /auth/callback. Step 2 enhanced AuthCallbackPage to handle PKCE codes, implicit-grant hash tokens, OAuth errors, and URL cleanup with replaceState. Email confirmation links will now redirect to the app's callback page instead of the default Supabase URL.
stepSummaries:
1. Add emailRedirectTo to signUp in src/lib/auth.ts so email confirmation links redirect back to /auth/callback instead of the default Supabase site URL [verified]
  2. Enhance AuthCallbackPage to handle URL hash fragments (#access_token) and error params in addition to ?code=, using getSession() as a fallback to detect implicit-grant sessions [verified]

reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Both steps have real verification. Step 1 verified emailRedirectTo present via grep. Step 2 verified all callback handling patterns via grep. These are syntactic verifications but the edits were targeted and the file contents confirmed the semantic changes.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Step 1: grep found emailRedirectTo in src/lib/auth.ts. Step 2: grep found getSession, replaceState, errorParam, type handling in AuthCallbackPage.tsx.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase goal met: signUp now explicitly redirects email confirmations to /auth/callback, and AuthCallbackPage robustly handles all callback scenarios. The combined output ensures email confirmation links no longer fall back to the default Supabase URL.
gateVerdicts.evidence: src/lib/auth.ts contains emailRedirectTo. src/pages/AuthCallbackPage.tsx contains getSession fallback and replaceState URL cleanup.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Nothing deferred. Password reset flow does not exist in the app yet, so no additional redirect configuration needed there. The scope of this ferment is email confirmation redirect only.
